classroomTitlePlaceholderTips: Classroom mode only shows slides; press F to toggle fullscreen, and use arrow keys or Space to change slides.
learningModeClassroomTooltip: Present slides and interactions on a shared screen (teacher only)
learningModeListenTooltip: Automatically play narration and slides, learning as you listen
learningModeReadTooltip: Read a course with rich text and visuals
lessonFeedbackCommentPlaceholder: Optional: share your feedback or suggestions
lessonFeedbackScoreRequired: Please choose a score from 1 to 5.
lessonPdfContentInProgress: Available after completing the entire lesson
lessonPdfCourseQrLabel: Scan to enter the course for one-on-one teaching and Q&A
lessonPdfFollowUpInProgress: Available when the follow-up answer finishes
lessonPdfPrepareFailed: Couldn't prepare the PDF. Please try again.
lessonPdfPrintHint: The print dialog will open; choose Save as PDF to download
listenAudioBackfillFailed: Audio generation failed. Please retry or keep reading.
listenInteractionHint: Complete this step to continue the course
listenModeTtsDisabled: Listen mode is not enabled for this course.
outputInProgress: Content is still generating. Please wait before retrying.
regenerateConfirmDescription: Regenerating will replace this content and all subsequent content. The current content will be cleared.
streamTimeoutRetry: The service timed out. Please refresh and try again.
